title: Shulker Vault
description: Have you ever want a vault to act fairly similar to a shulker box? The shulker vault retains its inventory and opens just like a shulker box.
body:
Shulker Vault

A NeoForge-first storage mod that bridges the gap between Vanilla Shulker Boxes and the Create Mod ecosystem.

[![Modrinth Downloads](https://img.shields.io/modrinth/dt/shulker-vault?color=00AF5C&label=Modrinth&logo=modrinth&logoColor=white&style=flat-square&cache=none)](https://modrinth.com/mod/create-shulker-vault) [![CurseForge Downloads](https://img.shields.io/curseforge/dt/1509542?color=F16436&label=CurseForge&logo=curseforge&logoColor=white&style=flat-square)](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/create-shulker-vault) [![GitHub Repository](https://img.shields.io/badge/GitHub-Source-181717?logo=github&logoColor=white&style=flat-square)](https://github.com/wyfyjohnson/Create-ShulkerVault) [![Codeberg Repository](https://img.shields.io/badge/Codeberg-Source-2185D0?logo=codeberg&logoColor=white&style=flat-square)](https://codeberg.org/wyfy/ShulkerVault)
--- ## 📦 Overview Welcome to **Shulker Vault**, a mod designed to create physically interactive, automation-friendly, quality-of-life storage blocks that feel perfectly natural alongside both vanilla Minecraft and the Create mod. This isn't just an animated container. It's a hybrid storage solution combining the mobility of a Shulker Box with the utility of Create's Item Vaults and Toolboxes, topped off with modern inventory conveniences. ## ✨ Features ### The Base Shulker Vault The core storage block of the mod, designed for everyday use and automation. * **Vanilla Familiarity:** 27 inventory slots with physical lid-opening animations and player-lifting mechanics. * **High Capacity:** Configurable per-slot stack multipliers (Defaults to `4x`, allowing massive storage in a small footprint). * **Create Integration:** Fully supports Create-style interaction patterns. Works seamlessly with chutes, funnels, hoppers, and wrench pickups (which safely preserve your inventory!). * **Quality of Life:** Built-in fast access and convenience interactions inspired by modern inventory mods. ### The Advanced Shulker Vault An upgraded, logistics-focused tier for power users and complex Create factories. Crafted via Mechanical Crafters using a Shulker Vault, an Electron Tube, and a Packager. * **All Base Features:** Upgrading your base vault preserves its entire inventory and metadata. * **Direct Package Unpacking:** Acts as its own package destination. It can receive and internally unpack Create packages directly from Frogports, funnels, and hoppers without needing a separate Packager block. * **Dedicated Package Slot:** Includes a specialized overflow slot to safely hold incoming packages if the main inventory cannot fully accommodate the unpacked items. * **Smart Memory:** Package-aware inventory memory behavior allows the block to predictably handle repeated deliveries of specific items. * **Searchable GUI:** Easily find what you're looking for with built-in search capabilities. ## ⚙️ Requirements * **Minecraft:** 1.21.1 * **Mod Loader:** NeoForge * **Dependencies:** [Create Mod](https://modrinth.com/mod/create) *Note: Shulker Vault is currently developed exclusively for NeoForge. Fabric support is not currently planned.* ## 🛠️ Configuration & Compatibility Shulker Vault is built to play nice with your favorite modpacks. * **Configurable Multipliers:** Adjust the per-slot stack multiplier in the configs to suit your modpack's balance. * **Smart Overrides:** Built-in QoL interactions are designed to avoid conflicts with dedicated inventory mods (like Easy Shulker Boxes or Sophisticated Backpacks). * **Stack Merging:** Items follow strict merging rules, ensuring components match perfectly before combining. ---
If you encounter any issues or have feature requests, please report them on our Issue Tracker.
